.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(247, 247, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(247, 247, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f7f7f7 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f7f7f7, color-mix(in srgb, #f7f7f7 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f7f7f7 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f7f7f7, color-mix(in srgb, #f7f7f7 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(247, 247, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(247, 247, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(247, 247, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(252, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
